name: Medellín
tagline: The City of Eternal Spring Where Your Dollar Blooms
description: Medellín delivers arguably the best value proposition in Latin America for FIRE retirees — perfect year-round weather, dramatically low costs, excellent private healthcare, and a booming innovation scene. Once infamous, the city has transformed into a global hotspot for digital nomads and early retirees seeking first-world amenities at developing-world prices.

quickFacts.visa: Colombia Retirement Visa (Visa M - Jubilado; requires pension or income ~$750/mo, renewable annually)
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate — very safe in El Poblado, Laureles, Envigado; standard urban caution elsewhere
quickFacts.climate: Tropical highland — eternal spring, 70-82°F year-round with two rainy seasons

housing.description: Furnished 1BR apartment in Laureles or Envigado with mountain views

dining.description: Menu del día lunches ($3-4), local restaurants, arepa stands, and weekend brunch

healthcare.description: EPS public insurance enrollment plus supplemental prepagada plan

transportation.description: Metro system, integrated bus network, and occasional taxi or InDriver rides

entertainment.description: Parque Arví hikes, free cultural events, salsa clubs, local brewery scene

1M.lifestyle: A furnished one-bedroom in Laureles or Envigado puts you in a walkable neighborhood with mountain views and affordable daily life. Menu del día lunches run a few dollars, the Metro covers most of the city, and weekend hikes to Parque Arví are practically free. The budget is comfortable here with room to spare, though you are cooking at home regularly and keeping entertainment simple.

housing.description: Modern 2BR apartment in El Poblado or upscale Laureles with pool, gym, and security

dining.description: Regular meals at El Poblado's international restaurants, craft cocktail bars, and coffee tours

healthcare.description: Premium prepagada plan with top clinics like Clínica Las Américas or Pablo Tobón Uribe

transportation.description: Frequent taxi and rideshare use, weekend car rentals for trips to Guatapé or Jardín

entertainment.description: Gym membership, Spanish classes, weekend finca trips, concerts, and coffee farm tours

2M.lifestyle: A modern two-bedroom in El Poblado or upper Laureles with pool and gym gives you a comfortable base. You dine out several times a week at international restaurants, take Spanish classes, and carry good private health insurance. Weekend car rentals for trips to Guatapé or coffee country fincas are easily in budget, and the year-round spring weather means low utility costs.

housing.description: Luxury 3BR penthouse in El Poblado's Golden Mile with panoramic valley views and concierge

dining.description: Fine dining at Carmen, El Cielo, and OCI weekly; daily restaurant meals without hesitation

healthcare.description: Top-tier prepagada, dental implant work, annual wellness retreats in Santa Marta

transportation.description: Personal driver, premium rideshares, domestic flights to Cartagena and Bogotá

entertainment.description: Country club membership, paragliding, VIP events at Colombiamoda, adventure travel

3M.lifestyle: A large penthouse in El Poblado with valley views, a personal trainer, and top-tier health insurance set the daily baseline. You eat at restaurants like Carmen and El Cielo regularly, take domestic flights to Cartagena or Bogotá for long weekends, and have a driver or premium rideshare for daily errands. This budget goes very far in Medellín — you live well above most locals and many expats.

housing.description: Ultra-luxury penthouse in El Tesoro area or sprawling finca-style home in Envigado hills with private pool

dining.description: Unlimited fine dining, private chef experiences, wine pairing dinners, culinary tours

healthcare.description: Platinum healthcare with US-standard specialists, medical concierge, cosmetic procedures

transportation.description: Full-time driver with SUV, domestic flights, helicopter tours to coffee country

entertainment.description: Exclusive club memberships, adventure sports, art collecting, Feria de las Flores VIP access

domesticHelp.description: Full-time live-in housekeeper, cook, and part-time gardener for your property

luxuryExtras.description: Weekend finca in coffee region, private salsa instructor, bespoke Colombian emerald jewelry

5M.lifestyle: A large home in the Envigado hills or a top-end El Poblado penthouse with a pool provides generous living space. A housekeeper comes several days a week, you have a driver, and dining at the city's best restaurants is routine. Business class flights for international travel and regular weekend trips to a rented finca in coffee country are comfortably within budget.

housing.description: Estate property in the hills of El Retiro or Las Palmas with multiple structures, pool, and 360° mountain views

dining.description: Private chef daily, exclusive supper clubs, regional culinary expeditions, imported wines

healthcare.description: Global concierge healthcare, annual US checkups, longevity medicine, personal wellness team

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle fleet with full-time chauffeur, private flights, yacht charters in Cartagena

entertainment.description: Philanthropic foundations, art patronage, exclusive social clubs, adventure expeditions to the Amazon

domesticHelp.description: Complete household staff: chef, two housekeepers, driver, groundskeeper, personal assistant, security

luxuryExtras.description: Multiple properties (Cartagena beach house, coffee finca, city penthouse), emerald mine investment, polo club

10M.lifestyle: A hilltop estate in El Retiro or Las Palmas with panoramic mountain views, a cook who prepares daily meals, a housekeeper, and a driver define daily life. You dine at the best restaurants freely, fly business class internationally, and travel domestically to Cartagena or the coffee region on a whim. This budget far exceeds what Medellín requires for a top-tier life — significant margin goes to savings, travel, or charitable involvement in the local community.
